/.title: Lorian - Minimal Portfolio Framer Template
/.description: Lorian is a clean portfolio Framer template designed for creatives who want their work to speak for itself.
h2: From responsive design to seamless UX, my work is driven by curiosity, attention to detail, and a deep passion for creating meaningful digital products.

I'm Lorian Hans, a Web Designer & Digital Creative with over a decade of experience crafting clean, user-focused digital experiences, I specialize in turning complex ideas into intuitive, beautiful websites.
p: Web Designer & Digital Creative based in France

Designed and developed 100+ websites for clients across tech, e-commerce, and creative industries. Led end-to-end design processes including strategy, UX research, wireframing, prototyping, and development.
Led the design team on client web projects, from discovery to launch. Oversaw design quality, brand alignment, and usability across all deliverables
Created custom website designs and landing pages for small-to-mid-size businesses. Delivered mobile-first, responsive designs with a strong focus on usability and aesthetics.
Supported senior designers on web projects, handling layout, typography, and visual refinements. Converted mockups into pixel-perfect HTML/CSS templates.
Working with Lorian was a game-changer. He took our outdated site and transformed it into a sleek, high-converting platform. Our customers noticed the difference immediately.
Lorian doesn’t just design websites, he builds experiences. He understood our brand from day one and translated it perfectly into a modern, intuitive interface.
I’ve hired many designers, but Lorian stands out for his sharp eye, communication, and attention to every detail. The final result exceeded all expectations.
From concept to launch, Lorian was professional, fast, and full of great ideas. Our site now feels fresh, fast, and incredibly user-friendly.
Lorian turned a vague idea into a fully functional and beautifully designed website. He guided us through every step and delivered beyond what we imagined.
Our traffic and engagement improved noticeably after launching the site Lorian designed. He’s a rare mix of creative and strategic thinking

I work with a wide range of clients, from startups and small businesses to creative professionals and established brands. Whether you're launching something new or refreshing your existing site, I tailor each project to your specific goals.
My core services include web design, UI/UX design, responsive development, branding, and e-commerce design. I also offer design consultations and website audits if you're looking for expert feedback.
Timelines vary depending on the scope, but most standard websites take between 2–5 weeks from initial concept to launch. I’ll provide a detailed timeline after our first consultation.
Pricing is based on the scope and complexity of the project. After discussing your goals, I’ll send you a custom quote with clear deliverables and milestones.
Yes. I offer redesign services to improve usability, visual design, and performance while keeping what's working and enhancing what's not.
Yes. I provide ongoing maintenance, content updates, and design support packages if you’d like continued assistance after your site goes live.
Whether you're looking to collaborate, start a new project, or simply connect. I’d love to hear from you.
